name: Impossible Brownie Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Chocolate, cooking - melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9x1-1/4" pie plate.
3. Beat eggs, melted margarine (or butter), and cooled chocolate in a blender on high for 10 seconds or using a hand beater for 30 seconds until smooth.
4. Add brown sugar, Bisquick (or baking mix), and granulated sugar to the mixture. Blend on high for 1 minute, stopping occasionally to scrape down sides, or beat with a hand beater for 2 minutes until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pie plate and sprinkle chopped nuts on top.
6. Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 35 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely before serving.
